package rulecoverage

func PositiveDnsLookupForAccessControl() string {
    ruleID := "dns_lookup_for_access_control"
    family := "security"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`net.LookupHost` or `net.LookupAddr` results used in access control decisions"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
